$comment: Release manifest for this Claude Code skills dev repo. `build` copies skill-src/<name>/ into dist/<name>/; `publish` opens a PR that places dist/<name>/ at <target_repo>/<target_path>/ and fills the target README's '## Skills' section from <readme_entry>. See tools/build_skill_payloads.py and tools/publish_agent_artifact_pr.py.
